items.title: Landmark module installation at Lufeng 2
items.summary: The CA01 'super module' has been installed at unit 2 of the Lufeng nuclear power plant in China's Guangdong province, China General Nuclear announced.

items.title: EDF extends life of UK's Heysham 1 and Hartlepool
